steps.title: Identify the equation parts
steps.content: In $0.4t+2=6$, $t$ is the number of months. The $2$ is the starting height, and the $6$ is the target height.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content: The term $0.4t$ represents growth over $t$ months. Because $0.4$ is multiplied by the number of months, it is the monthly growth rate: the number of inches the plant grows each month. The answer is B.
